metadata.description: Official Talon plugins for Claude Code — browser control, automation, and more

plugins.name: talon
plugins.description: All-in-one Talon plugin — browser control, channels (22 adapters), computer use, AI dispatch, autoresearch, GitLab scrum. Use /talon:* commands.

plugins.name: talon-web
plugins.description: Full browser control via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, run JS.

plugins.name: talon-channels
plugins.description: Universal channel server — connect any client via WebSocket. Full hook event forwarding, permission relay, bidirectional chat.

plugins.name: talon-computer-use
plugins.description: Control macOS desktop — mouse, keyboard, screenshots, windows, displays, clipboard. Native Quartz automation via usecomputer CLI.

plugins.name: talon-autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous experiment loop — iteratively edit, test, measure, keep/discard. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch.

plugins.name: talon-ai-dispatch
plugins.description: Dispatch subagents to multiple AI backends (GLM, Doubao, DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax). Simple: dispatch ark-code "prompt"

plugins.name: talon-gitlab-scrum
plugins.description: GitLab Scrum management via glab CLI — issues, milestones, boards, wiki, sprint planning.
